megaMenu.acendaeersReady: Acendaeers are ready to guide your next move.

meta.title: Acendae | Strategy & Engineering
meta.description: Every business has its mountain. Acendae is the guide.

hero.eyebrow: Dutch strategy. World-class execution. One integrated team
hero.title: Every business has its mountain, Acendae is the guide
hero.subtitle: We help businesses ascend through strategy, technology, and people. From first steps to scalable systems — we climb together, step by step.
hero.image_caption: From idea to scale strategy, design, technology, and teams that grow with you.

social_proof.title: Progress is not a shortcut. It's a journey.
social_proof.body: Acendae was born from the idea of ascension rising with intention, structure, and trust. We believe sustainable growth is built step by step, not rushed through quick wins. Many businesses struggle with unclear technical decisions, unreliable delivery, or scaling their teams at the wrong moment. That's where we come in. We partner with organisations at every stage of their journey — from launching a first website, to building complex software, to scaling through automation or dedicated teams.

sri_lanka.title: Sri Lanka
sri_lanka.body1: Top-tier technical talent, deep engineering expertise, innovation, and execution power. This is where ideas are built, scaled, and refined.
sri_lanka.body2: Together, this allows our clients to move faster without losing control — and scale without sacrificing quality. This is not outsourcing. This is one global team, aligned in standards, ownership, and ambition.

netherlands.title: The Netherlands
netherlands.body: Strategy, structure, clarity, client relationships, and premium quality. This is where vision is shaped and direction is set.

social_proof.tagline: Dutch strategy. Sri Lankan execution. One team.

two_ways.title: Two Ways to Climb With Acendae
two_ways.subtitle: Choose the path that fits your journey

outsource.title: Outsource Your Project
outsource.subtitle: For clear goals & focused delivery.
outsource.body: When you outsource a project to Acendae, we take responsibility from start to finish – while keeping you closely involved at every step.
outsource.footer_note: Often chosen by founders and product teams with a clear roadmap who want certainty, structure, and quality delivery.

team.title: Build a Dedicated Team
team.subtitle: For sustainable growth & continuous development
team.body: When you build a team with Acendae, you gain dedicated developers or complete teams that work as part of your organisation.
items: Teams aligned with your tools, processes, and culture
team.footer_note: Often chosen by scale-ups, software companies, and digital agencies expanding delivery capacity.

development.name: Web & App Development
development.description: From MVP to enterprise systems, we build scalable software that fits your business.

engineering.name: Platform Engineering
engineering.description: Deep backend expertise and infrastructure design to ensure your system never fails under pressure.

outsourcing.name: Team Outsourcing
outsourcing.description: Scale your technical bandwidth with long-term, dedicated talent aligned with your standards.

experience.name: Digital Experience
experience.description: Balancing business requirements with intuitive user experience to drive conversion and loyalty.

basecamp.title: Discovery & Basecamp
basecamp.desc: We map out your current state, define technical requirements, and build a roadmap for the journey ahead.

ascent.title: The Ascent
ascent.desc: Sprint by sprint, our teams build, test, and release. You remain involved in every critical decision.

summit.title: Summit & Scale
summit.desc: We launch and optimize. Once the foundation holds we shift toward maintenance, iterations, and long-term scaling.

quote.text: By letting Acendae manage our technical load, we could focus entirely on expanding our market presence.

join.title: Join the climb
join.subtitle: We are always looking for people who care.
join.body1: At Acendae, we don't just write code or design screens. We solve real problems for real businesses.
join.body2: We are a team that values structure, open communication, and taking ownership.
join.body3: If you want to work on complex, high-impact projects — you belong here.
join.body4: We work hard, but we also respect boundaries. Because sustainable growth applies to people, too.
join.right_quote: Empowering global talent to do their best work.

cta.readySubtext1: Let's talk about where you are today — and what the next step should be.
cta.readySubtext2: Whether you need a project delivered or a team built around your growth, we'll guide you to the right setup.
cta.tagline: We'll find the right next step.
